company.title: Small Giant. Big Impact.
company.subtitle: Korea's GSSA Specialist Since 2004
company.description: As a dedicated GSSA, airline cargo representation is our core identity — not a side business. Our MPL and EAN network memberships give us capabilities that rival companies many times our size.
company.identity: Est. 2004 GSSA Specialist | MPL & EAN Member | Strong Commercial & Operational Capabilities

strengths.local: Strong local dominance at Incheon/Busan hubs
strengths.market: Optimal route proposals by expert groups

values.velocityDesc: Logistics at the speed of business

company.ceoQuote: "In logistics, every shipment carries not just cargo, but our clients' trust and reputation."

hero.subheadline: 15+ airlines. 50+ countries. One dedicated team in Korea.

whyGssa.title: We Think Like an Airline. We Act Like Your Team.
whyGssa.description: A GSSA is not a middleman. We are your dedicated commercial team in Korea — selling your capacity, managing your brand, and growing your revenue as if it were our own business.
whyGssa.definitionBody: We handle everything — from cargo sales and pricing to capacity management and customer relationships. Airlines gain a fully operational commercial team in Korea without the overhead of building one.
whyGssa.whyBody: Our airline partners see immediate impact: increased load factors, stronger forwarder relationships, and real-time market intelligence that drives revenue growth. 20+ years of track record in Korea proves it.

sales.title: In the Market
sales.description: We sell smart, act fast, and deliver consistently. Our local teams know every forwarder, every route, every opportunity in Korea.

capacity.title: In the Air
capacity.description: Dynamic pricing, yield optimization, and strategic space allocation that maximizes your revenue per flight.

intelligence.title: On the Ground
intelligence.description: Trade flow analysis, seasonal forecasting, competitive benchmarking, and regulatory intelligence — updated weekly.

digital.title: In the Cloud
digital.description: Real-time dashboards, API connectivity, digital booking platforms, and performance analytics at your fingertips.

services.title: Beyond GSSA — Full Logistics Capability
services.subtitle: Air, ocean, and project cargo expertise to complement our airline partnerships.

air.name: Air Freight
air.description: Express and time-critical air cargo solutions with GSA/CSA expertise for major carriers.

ocean.name: Ocean Freight
ocean.description: Full container load (FCL) and less than container load (LCL) services worldwide.

project.name: Project Cargo
project.description: Specialized handling for oversized, heavy, and high-value project shipments.

mro.name: Goodman Aero Solutions (MRO)
mro.description: Total solutions supporting safe aircraft operations including AOG support, parts sale/exchange, and consignment.

gsa.title: Airlines We Represent
gsa.subtitle: Trusted by carriers worldwide to grow their Korean market presence
gsa.description: From flag carriers to specialty freighters, we deliver dedicated cargo sales representation across every segment.
